data.title: Milliman MedInsight achieves ONC eCQM certification for 2026 to enhance value-based care efforts.
data.description: In Seattle on January 20, 2026, Milliman MedInsight®, a prominent healthcare data and analytics branch of Milliman, is gearing up for a strong start in 2026 within the realm of value-based care. The company has garnered recognition from the Office of the National Coordinator for Health Information as it continues to make strides in this field.

data.title: Oregon-based startup Full launches mobile-first food pantry software to modernize food distribution for nonprofits, enhancing access and efficiency.
data.description: A new platform has been launched in Portland, Oregon on January 20, 2026, by the technology startup Full (Full Pantry LLC). This platform aims to enhance access, efficiency, and dignity for food-insecure households, while also aiding pantries in operating more effectively. The Food Access Tool is designed to be mobile-first, providing crucial support to those in need. This initiative addresses the issue of food insecurity, offering innovative solutions for both individuals and pantries.

data.title: Haig Partners LLC advises on sale of Santa Monica BMW, serving the luxury market. Deal involves long-standing ownership of 40+ years.
data.description: Haig Partners LLC recently acted as the exclusive sell-side advisor for the sale of Santa Monica BMW, a well-regarded dealership owned by Del Montell for over 40 years. Established in 1974 and acquired by Montell in 1983, Santa Monica BMW has been a prominent player in serving the Santa Monica and greater Westside markets. Known for its strong reputation, the dealership's sale was overseen by Haig Partners LLC, a top buy-sell advisory firm for auto retailers in the U.S. This move highlights the continuous growth and evolution of the auto industry in the region, where BMW's offerings align well with the preferences for performance and design.

data.title: Scott Bessent advises Powell against attending Supreme Court argument on Fed independence after attending a tariff case.
data.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent criticized Jerome Powell's decision to participate in hearings regarding Federal Reserve independence, labeling it as an error. Bessent himself was involved in a tariff case, implying a double standard in his stance on public officials attending legal arguments.

data.title: F&M Bank honored in Newsweek's America's Best Regional Banks & Credit Unions 2026 for excellence in safety and service.
data.description: Farmers & Merchants Bank (F&M Bank) in Long Beach, California, was recently acknowledged as one of America's Best Regional Banks & Credit Unions of 2026 by Newsweek. The award highlights F&M Bank's dedication to safety, security, and service. This recognition is a testament to the bank's impact on its community and commitment to providing top-notch financial services.

data.title: Remote acquired Atlas to enhance HR platform, integrating financial tools for global teams. Acquisition completed on Jan 20, 2026.
data.description: Remote, a top global employment operating system, has recently finalized the acquisition of Atlas, a company specializing in expense management. The acquisition aims to enhance Remote's HR and payroll platform by incorporating Atlas's financial tools. This will enable Remote to offer a more comprehensive solution to modern workforces looking to streamline their operations. The acquisition was completed on January 20, 2026, in San Francisco.

data.title: Data breach from third-party vendor exposes customer order details, prompting phishing attacks against Ledger users, with no compromise to wallets.
data.description: A breach in a third-party e-commerce platform exposed order data, allowing for phishing attempts to occur. It's important to note that this breach did not compromise any Ledger wallets or self-custody systems. This incident highlights the vulnerability of customer information in online transactions. Vigilance and security measures are crucial to protect sensitive data in the digital realm.

data.title: Fortrade's Dubai entity, Fortrade (DIFC) Limited, receives regulatory approval from DFSA on Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: Fortrade recently revealed that its Dubai branch, Fortrade (DIFC) Limited, has secured regulatory approval from the Dubai Financial Services Authority on January 20, 2026. This authorization places the company within the regulatory landscape of the Dubai International Financial Center.

CARNEY SAYS BOARD OF PEACE SHOULD BE DESIGNED TO ADDRESS GAZA NEEDS

data.title: Garrett Metal Detectors unveils Paragon™, their first software host using AI technology called Clarity™.
data.description: Yesterday, Garrett Metal Detectors from Texas revealed that their Paragon™ walk-through metal detector has become the initial platform for software creation through Clarity™, Garrett's innovative AI-driven technology system. This marks a significant milestone for the company as they launch this exclusive platform.

data.title: Sanctuary Camelback Mountain Resort & Spa completes $7M renovation for meetings and events, setting new standards.
data.description: Paradise Valley, Arizona - On January 20, 2026, Sanctuary Camelback Mountain Resort & Spa in Paradise Valley revealed a $7 million renovation that has raised the bar for event and celebration venues. The award-winning resort has undergone a significant transformation to enhance its premier facilities, setting a new standard for luxury in the area.

data.title: Behati Hart's memoir "Just BE" delves into identity and liberation, released on Jan. 20, 2026, in Aurora, Illinois.
data.description: Behati Hart, a prominent speaker and author from Aurora, Illinois, recently unveiled her latest memoir titled "Just BE: Unmasking and Becoming Human Again" on January 20, 2026. This book delves into the experiences of high-achieving women who decide to break free from societal expectations and embrace their true selves. Hart's memoir reflects a deeply personal journey and provides insight into the challenges and transformations that come with authenticity. This release is set to captivate audiences as it offers a unique perspective on self-discovery and empowerment.

data.title: Legal firm Massumi + Consoli hires Trevor Katende as Partner in LA to enhance M&A capabilities. Firm aims to support growing demand from acquirers.
data.description: A renowned nationwide law firm, Massumi + Consoli, known for its top-tier private equity and M&A services, revealed its latest move to meet increasing demand from key acquirers. The firm, based in Los Angeles, shared on January 20, 2026, that it has welcomed Trevor Katende as a Partner to support their growing capacity.

data.title: Shawn Kitzmiller appointed President of U.S. Sales at Pomeroy to scale managed services and smart platform.
data.description: Pomeroy Technologies, LLC based in Hebron, Kentucky, has appointed Shawn Kitzmiller as the President of U.S. Sales. This move aims to strengthen the company's sales division in the United States.

data.title: Twilio and AEG partner to personalize fan engagement in ticketing, sports, and live entertainment; expanding relationship.
data.description: A new strategic partnership has been announced between Twilio, the customer engagement platform, and AEG in Los Angeles. This collaboration marks a significant expansion in their relationship and will encompass AEG's diverse portfolio. This partnership signifies a closer relationship between the two entities and is expected to bring about mutually beneficial outcomes.

data.title: Big Joe Forklifts launches Big Joe Financial Services to aid dealers & customers in financing forklifts, warehouse equipment.联Competitive options by PNC Vendor Finance, Verdant Commercial Capital, Mitsubishi HC Capital America.
data.description: Big Joe Forklifts has introduced Big Joe Financial Services (BJFS) in Madison, Wisconsin, to offer financing solutions for their complete range of forklifts, warehouse equipment, and autonomous solutions. The new service aims to provide competitive financing options to dealers and end-users. BJFS has partnered with renowned financing providers including PNC Vendor Finance, Verdant Commercial Capital, and Mitsubishi HC Capital America. This initiative seeks to facilitate equipment access and drive sales, with trusted financial support available to dealers and customers.
